mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_PLACE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT SEQ_COMMENT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT SEQ_CATEGORY_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT SEQ_WISH_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT ua.USER_NO FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE ( PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL ) VALUES ( #{placeNo}, #{placeContentId}, #{placeName}, #{placeCategory}, #{placeAddress}, #{placeLatitude}, #{placeLongitude}, 0, #{placeNumber}, #{placeThumbnailUrl} )

INSERT INTO PLACE_REVIEW ( COMMENT_NO, LOG_NO, PLACE_NO, COMMENT_CONTENT, RATING, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{commentNo}, #{logNo}, #{placeNo}, #{commentContent}, #{rating}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE p SET p.PLACE_RATING = ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(pr.RATING), 1), 0) FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr WHERE pr.PLACE_NO = p.PLACE_NO ) WHERE p.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}

SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_CONTENT_ID = #{value} AND PLACE_CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_NAME = #{placeName} AND ( (#{placeAddress} IS NOT NULL AND PLACE_ADDRESS = #{placeAddress}) OR (#{placeAddress} IS NULL AND (PLACE_ADDRESS IS NULL OR TRIM(PLACE_ADDRESS) = '')) ) ORDER BY PLACE_NO ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_NAME = #{placeName} AND PLACE_LATITUDE IS NOT NULL AND PLACE_LONGITUDE IS NOT NULL AND ABS(PLACE_LATITUDE - #{placeLatitude}) <= 0.0001 AND ABS(PLACE_LONGITUDE - #{placeLongitude}) <= 0.0001 ORDER BY PLACE_NO ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT TM.TAG_NAME FROM PLACE_TAG_MAP PTM JOIN TAG_MASTER TM ON TM.TAG_CODE = PTM.TAG_CODE WHERE PTM.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY PTM.TAG_WEIGHT DESC, TM.TAG_NAME ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL LIKE '/resources/%' THEN '..' || PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL LIKE '/place/%' THEN '..' || PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL IS NOT NULL THEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.PHOTO_BINARY IS NOT NULL THEN '../place/review-photo/' || TO_CHAR(PD.PHOTO_NO) ELSE NULL END AS PHOTO_URL FROM PLACE_REVIEW PR JOIN PHOTO_DATA PD ON PD.COMMENT_NO = PR.COMMENT_NO WHERE PR.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} AND (PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL IS NOT NULL OR PD.PHOTO_BINARY IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY PD.PHOTO_NO DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL LIKE '/resources/%' THEN '..' || PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL LIKE '/place/%' THEN '..' || PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL IS NOT NULL THEN PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL WHEN PD.PHOTO_BINARY IS NOT NULL THEN '../place/review-photo/' || TO_CHAR(PD.PHOTO_NO) ELSE NULL END AS PHOTO_URL FROM PHOTO_DATA PD WHERE PD.COMMENT_NO = #{value} AND (PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL IS NOT NULL OR PD.PHOTO_BINARY IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY PD.PHOTO_NO ASC
SELECT PHOTO_NO, COMMENT_NO, LOG_PHOTO_URL, PHOTO_BINARY, PHOTO_MIME_TYPE, PHOTO_FILE_NAME FROM PHOTO_DATA WHERE PHOTO_NO = #{value}

SELECT pr.COMMENT_NO, pr.LOG_NO, pr.PLACE_NO, pr.COMMENT_CONTENT, pr.RATING, pr.CREATED_BY AS CREATED_BY_AUTH_ID, NVL(u.USER_NICKNAME, NVL(pr.CREATED_BY, 'anonymous')) AS CREATED_BY, pr.CREATED_AT FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr LEFT JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_AUTH_ID = pr.CREATED_BY LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_NO = ua.USER_NO WHERE pr.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY pr.CREATED_AT DESC, pr.COMMENT_NO DESC

SELECT r.COMMENT_NO, r.LOG_NO, r.PLACE_NO, r.PLACE_NAME, r.COMMENT_CONTENT, r.RATING, r.CREATED_BY_AUTH_ID, r.CREATED_BY, r.CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT pr.COMMENT_NO, pr.LOG_NO, pr.PLACE_NO, p.PLACE_NAME, pr.COMMENT_CONTENT, pr.RATING, pr.CREATED_BY AS CREATED_BY_AUTH_ID, NVL(u.USER_NICKNAME, NVL(pr.CREATED_BY, 'anonymous')) AS CREATED_BY, pr.CREATED_AT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pr.CREATED_AT DESC, pr.COMMENT_NO DESC) AS rn FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr LEFT JOIN PLACE p ON p.PLACE_NO = pr.PLACE_NO LEFT JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_AUTH_ID = pr.CREATED_BY LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_NO = ua.USER_NO WHERE pr.CREATED_BY = #{createdBy} ) r WHERE r.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY r.rn

SELECT r.COMMENT_NO, r.LOG_NO, r.PLACE_NO, r.PLACE_NAME, r.COMMENT_CONTENT, r.RATING, r.CREATED_BY_AUTH_ID, r.CREATED_BY, r.CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT pr.COMMENT_NO, pr.LOG_NO, pr.PLACE_NO, p.PLACE_NAME, pr.COMMENT_CONTENT, pr.RATING, pr.CREATED_BY AS CREATED_BY_AUTH_ID, NVL(u.USER_NICKNAME, NVL(pr.CREATED_BY, 'anonymous')) AS CREATED_BY, pr.CREATED_AT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY pr.CREATED_AT ASC, pr.COMMENT_NO ASC
ORDER BY NVL(pr.RATING, 0) DESC, pr.CREATED_AT DESC, pr.COMMENT_NO DESC
ORDER BY pr.CREATED_AT DESC, pr.COMMENT_NO DESC
) AS rn FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr LEFT JOIN PLACE p ON p.PLACE_NO = pr.PLACE_NO LEFT JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_AUTH_ID = pr.CREATED_BY LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_NO = ua.USER_NO WHERE pr.CREATED_BY = #{createdBy} ) r WHERE r.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY r.rn
SELECT CATEGORY_NO, USER_NO, CATEGORY_TYPE, CATEGORY_IS_USED FROM CATEGORY WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY CATEGORY_NO DESC

SELECT w.WISH_NO, w.PLACE_NO, w.CATEGORY_NO, w.USER_NO, w.WISH_DATE, c.CATEGORY_TYPE, c.CATEGORY_IS_USED FROM WISHLIST w JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_NO = w.CATEGORY_NO AND c.USER_NO = w.USER_NO WHERE w.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND w.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY w.WISH_NO DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_NO) FROM WISHLIST WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.PLACE_NO) FROM WISHLIST w JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = w.USER_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}

SELECT DISTINCT p.PLACE_NO, p.PLACE_CONTENT_ID, p.PLACE_NAME, p.PLACE_CATEGORY, p.PLACE_ADDRESS, p.PLACE_LATITUDE, p.PLACE_LONGITUDE, p.PLACE_RATING, p.PLACE_NUMBER, p.PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM WISHLIST w JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = w.USER_NO JOIN PLACE p ON p.PLACE_NO = w.PLACE_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value} ORDER BY p.PLACE_NAME ASC

SELECT w.WISH_NO, w.PLACE_NO, w.CATEGORY_NO, w.USER_NO, w.WISH_DATE, c.CATEGORY_TYPE, c.CATEGORY_IS_USED, p.PLACE_NAME, p.PLACE_ADDRESS, p.PLACE_LATITUDE, p.PLACE_LONGITUDE, p.PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM WISHLIST w JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = w.USER_NO JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_NO = w.CATEGORY_NO AND c.USER_NO = w.USER_NO JOIN PLACE p ON p.PLACE_NO = w.PLACE_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value} ORDER BY c.CATEGORY_TYPE ASC, p.PLACE_NAME ASC, w.WISH_NO DESC
SELECT HOURS_ID, PLACE_NO, DAY_OF_WEEK, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, BREAK_STRAT_TIME, BREAK_END_TIME, LAST_ORDER, IS_CLOSED FROM PLACE_HOURS WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY DAY_OF_WEEK ASC
SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_CATEGORY FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PLACE_NO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PLACE_NO as placeNo, p.PLACE_NAME as placeName, p.PLACE_CATEGORY as placeCategory, p.PLACE_ADDRESS as placeAddress, p.PLACE_RATING as placeRating, p.PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL as placeThumbnailUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE_REVIEW r WHERE r.PLACE_NO = p.PLACE_NO) as reviewCount FROM PLACE p
(p.PLACE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.PLACE_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
1=1
ORDER BY
p.PLACE_NAME ASC
reviewCount DESC, p.PLACE_RATING DESC, p.PLACE_NAME ASC
)
WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT p.place_no AS placeNo, p.place_name AS placeName, p.place_address AS placeAddress, p.place_thumbnail_url AS placeThumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN up.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS savedYn FROM places p LEFT JOIN users_place up ON p.place_no = up.place_no AND up.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.place_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
